messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: At what rate are chromium concentrations increasing at the most affected station?

Finding to evaluate: stations upstream of the anomaly source maintain background-level trace metal readings throughout the study

Response A:


Response B:
Chromium at WQ-03 has risen from background (<5 ug/L) through initial elevation (12-18 ug/L) to concerning levels (40-65 ug/L) during the escalation phase. The rate of increase has been roughly doubling every few reporting periods.

Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
/no_think
